2025May 18, 2025

🇺🇸 Little Rock, AR, USA

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Little Rock, United States, May 18, 2025 -- May 23, 2025

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2025-05-little-rock-arkansas-usa

22 Resolutions

1168Plenary
Launch a PWI for ISO 13584-26 ed2
SC4 resolves to initiate a project to update ISO 13584-26 ed2 to develop a New Work Item Proposal (NP) at the next plenary in October 2025 with the following terms of reference: * Register a Prelim...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1167Plenary
Call for contributions for ISO/PWI TR 25272
SC4 requests its Committee Manager launch a CIB to share this call to the committee and committees in liaison.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1166Plenary
Convert ISO/CD TR 17999 to a PAS
SC4 requests its Committee Manager to launch ISO/PAS 17999 -- Automation systems and integration -- Reference model for industrial data standards with SDT 18 track and at stage 50.00 utilizing the ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1165Plenary
Launch revision to ISO 8000-2 ed 6
SC4 requests its Committee Manager coordinate with ISO/CS and launch edition 6 using the SDT 18 track, nominates Hayley Thompson as Project Leader, and allocates the work to WG 23 with the followin...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1164Plenary
Change ISO/AWI 15926-4 ed4 schedule from SDT 18 to SDT 24
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and move the ISO/AWI TS 15926-4 ed4, ISO PID:90901 project from SDT 18 to SDT 24 with the following target dates for each stage: * Comm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1163Plenary
Change ISO/AWI 23726-2 schedule from SDT 24 to SDT 36
SC4 requests its Committee Manager to coordinate with ISO/CS and move the ISO/AWI 23726-2 project from SDT 24 to SDT 36 with the following target dates for each stage: * 30.00 Committee draft (CD) ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1162Plenary
Revise Schedule for ISO 23726-3 IDO for an exceptional 9-month extension
SC4 requests its Committee Manager submit the project limit date extension request to ISO/CS with the following target and limit dates: * Stage 40 Target date: 2025-09-13 * Stage 40 Limit date: 202...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1161Plenary
Establish a Maintenance Agency for ISO 23726 Ontology based interoperability
SC4 recommends establishing a maintenance agency (MA) for ISO 23726-3 and ISO 23726-100 ontologies with scope, duties, and operations defined in the terms of reference documented in WG 26/N 78.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1160Plenary
Establish a Category A Liaison with POSC Caesar Association
Recognizing the contribution POSC Caesar Association is making to SC4, the committee accepts the request from the POSC Caesar Association to establish a two-way Category A liaison, request its Comm...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1159Plenary
Establish a Category C Liaison from ALICIA Project to WG 26
SC4 concurs with the request and welcomes the ALICIA project as a Category C Liaison to WG 26.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1158Plenary
Establish a Category C Liaison from ALICIA Project to WG 15
SC4 concurs with the request and welcomes the ALICIA project as a Category C Liaison to WG 15.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1157Plenary
Establish Study Group 1 on Industrial data and digital twin
SC 4 establishes Study Group 1 -- Industrial data and digital twin with the following terms of reference: * Examine the current implementations of digital twin in SC4 standards and related organiza...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1156Plenary
Disband AhG 3 on UUID management for industrial data
SC 4 accepts the report and its recommendations, thanks the AhG for its efforts and disbands AhG 3.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1155Plenary
Appoint Convenors for WG 13 and WG 23

ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
